name: @caistech/portfolio-env-sync
description: Manifest-driven portfolio env audit + apply for Vercel projects. v0.5 --apply; v0.6 from_supabase resolution; v0.7 secrets: block; v0.8 auth_config (Supabase Auth Site URL, redirect URLs, rate limits via Management API); v0.9 from_env secret source (operator-shell-sourced secrets → Vercel sensitive, e.g. Stripe).
